hotel_name: Tru by Hilton Trung tâm thành phố Việt Trì (Tru by Hilton Viet Tri City Centre)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Guests who use the service but encounter issues are resolved as if they did not use the service, and there seems to be no support for those who have used the hotel's services.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Minh was great

reviews.title: couldn’t stay
reviews.text: I couldn’t stay here. Because the hotel staff told me they couldn't find my reservation.
reviews.response:
Dear K2,
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and frustration caused when we were unable to locate your reservation upon arrival. This is certainly not the level of service we aim to deliver at Tru by Hilton.

We completely understand how disappointing it must have been, especially since you’ve trusted our brand before. Please be assured that we are working closely with our team and third-party partners like Agoda to better prevent such situations in the future.

Your time is valuable, and I regret the disruption this caused to your plans. Should your travels bring you back to the area, I would appreciate the opportunity to personally assist with your booking to ensure a smooth stay.

Tru-ly regards,

reviews.title: Great place close to Han Oi
reviews.positives: Modern hotel with a great service. Laundry facilities. Great breakfast, the Pho was fantastic! Easy to park the motorcycle.

reviews.title: Pay for the service, not just a place to sleep.
reviews.text: The staff did not prepare all the items before the guest checked in. When it was time to clean the room, I couldn't find the hand towels, and they spoke as if the guest had taken them. I asked to see my bag, and that lady spoke in a way that implied the guest took the items, but I didn’t want to argue. What would I do with just two hand towels? I was ready to spend nearly a million for one night, so I shouldn’t have had an experience like this.

reviews.title: JOJO on adore
reviews.positives:
On est fan des SOJO Hotels, du concept quand on est voyageur nomade en vélo.
C'est notre 5em hôtel de cet marque que nous avons fait
reviews.negatives: Rien de particulier, j'aime les SOJO.

reviews.title: Great Stay
reviews.text: This is a really nice hotel, it’s really clean and has that new feeling. Although it’s in the city, it’s a few KM away from the shops, such as Vincom Mall. Staff spoke perfect English and were very helpful. Breakfast was ok, but needs to improve to maintain the high standards.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your kind feedback about your stay at Tru by Hilton Việt Trì. We are delighted to know that you appreciated the cleanliness, modern atmosphere, and the support from our English-speaking team.

We also appreciate your comments regarding breakfast. Your feedback has been shared with our F&B team as we continuously look for ways to enhance the breakfast experience and maintain our service standards.

We truly hope to welcome you back again in the near future.

Warm regards,

Giang Nguyen - Guest Operations Manager

Tru By Hilton Viet Tri City Centre

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Preis/Leistung top. Für eine Nacht absolut empfehlenswert.

reviews.title: a nite in viet tri
reviews.text:
I had a very pleasant stay at Tru by Hilton Viet Tri Hotel. The property feels more like a boutique hotel, offering a cozy yet modern atmosphere that perfectly suits the needs of a solo traveller. All the essentials are well provided, ensuring a comfortable and convenient stay.

The room was very clean, well-maintained, and thoughtfully designed for functionality. The staff were genuinely friendly and helpful, creating a welcoming environment throughout my stay. I also appreciated the breakfast spread — it was sufficient, with a good variety to start the day right.

Overall, Tru by Hilton Viet Tri Hotel exceeded my expectations in terms of cleanliness, comfort, and service. I would gladly recommend it to solo travellers or anyone looking for a simple yet reliable stay in Viet Tri.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Norerwana, 
Greetings from Tru by Hilton Viet Tri City Centre. 
On behalf of team, I'd like to thank you for your feedback. We're thrilled you enjoyed your stay at Tru by Hilton Viet Tri City Centre. 
Your kind words inspire our team alots. Thank you!
We hope to welcome you back soon!
Tru-ly regards, 
Yen Nguyen
Guest Operation Manager

reviews.title: Chỗ nghỉ ổn, nhỏ nhắn, đáp ứng các yêu cầu cơ bản nhưng cần nâng cao CL nhân viên.
reviews.positives: Bữa sáng 95k trả thêm thì nên lựa chọn ăn ngoài.
reviews.negatives: Nhân viên chưa thực sự Hướng khách hàng. Đang đặt quyền lợi của KS hơn là quyền lợi của khách hàng, ít nhất là cách giao tiếp khiến khách hàng cảm thấy như vậy. Thời kì cao điểm do có giải chạy nhưng khi có vướng mắc thì không đặt mình ở vị trí khách hàng để giải quyết.

reviews.title: Sojo là 1 chuỗi khách sạn mới, thiết kế theo phong cách Nhật Bản, đáng để trải nghiệm.
reviews.positives: Tinh thần cầu thị của quản lí khách sạn sau khi nhận được góp ý. Với tinh thần cầu thị như vậy, tôi tin chất lượng dịch vụ của chuỗi KS Sojo sẽ ngày một tốt hơn. Tôi sẽ lựa chọn chuỗi KS Sojo vì tinh thần cầu thị và chất lượng phòng nghỉ.
reviews.negatives: Nhân viên trẻ cần có thêm thời gian để rèn luyện kỹ năng hướng khách hàng.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: There wasn't much enough restraints such as not local.

reviews.title: Value money choice for high standard hotel at Phu Tho. Should stay for your trip at here
reviews.positives: Small room but good choice: clean, good facilities, good breakfast and quite modern hotel. Good location also (close to Den Hung (pagoda) - the very famous pagoda in Phu Tho, Vietnam).
reviews.negatives: The wall can not keep silent from noise of room neighbors. No view at here

reviews.title: Lovely and will gome back to
reviews.positives: Clean, bright and moderrn.  Staffs are lovely and helpful staffs, shoutout to Huy and Minh, for the extra effort in helping us on things despite the language barrier.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Please upgrade the complimentary water bottle, two mini bottles are simply not enough even for 1 pax, and we are 2 pax. Water is basic need, with a 20 sqm room, your profit margin is higher than luxury hotel, everyone can see so.
reviews.negatives: Complimentary water in room, too little

reviews.title: Pleasant
reviews.positives: It was very modern and comfortable, also very clean.
reviews.negatives: I didn’t liked the breakfast that much, but it is my personal taste, it still very complete

reviews.title: ASEAN Mitsubishi Electric Cup 2024 (Vietnam X Singapore) stay
reviews.positives: The convenient location to Viet Tri Stadium (550m from the hotel which is walking distance), staff are very helpful despite language barrier
reviews.negatives: Hotel taxi fares to and fro Noi Bai Airport is too expensive (can be cheaper, say around 500000-700000 VND)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The place was very good. They have easy to use washing machines if necessary. The room is very modern and the night's rest was awesome. Staff was very friendly and willing to help even though the level of English wasn't on par.
reviews.negatives: The level of English wasn't on par for such a nice hotel. Communication was doable with a translate app.
